blocks.desc: 因为直接用组件会去空格 所以执行js代码

inputs.name: _jscode
inputs.value: "document.evaluate(\"//span[text()='添加业务表单' or text()='修改业务表单']/../following-sibling::div//form//label[text()='表单名称']/following-sibling::div//input\", document).iterateNext().value='{}'".format(业务表单['name'])

inputs.name: 自定义代码块
inputs.value:
from selenium.webdriver.common.keys import Keys
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
import pyperclip
pyperclip.copy(业务表单['name'])
suc=sendiRPA.Browser.setText(_browser=glv["hWeb"], xpath=sendiRPA.createXpath(xpath="//span[text()='添加业务表单'  or text()='修改业务表单']/../following-sibling::div//form//label[text()='表单名称']/following-sibling::div//input",iframe=[]), _text='', is_encrypt=False, is_addinput=False, delayBefore=0, delayAfter=0, continue_On_Failure=True, _timeout=1)
try:
    ele = hWeb.find_element(By.XPATH, "//span[text()='添加业务表单'  or text()='修改业务表单']/../following-sibling::div//form//label[text()='表单名称']/following-sibling::div//input")
    ele.send_keys(Keys.CONTROL, 'v')
    logger.info("业务表单名称输入成功", exc_info=True)
except Exception as e:
    logger.info("业务表单名称输入失败", exc_info=True)

try:

    ele.send_keys(Keys.CONTROL, 'v')
    logger.info("业务表单名称输入成功", exc_info=True)

try:
    ele = hWeb.find_element(By.XPATH, "//span[text()='添加业务表单'  or text()='修改业务表单']/../following-sibling::div//form//label[text()='表单名称']/following-sibling::div//input")
    ele.send_keys(Keys.CONTROL, 'v')
    logger.info("业务表单名称输入成功", exc_info=True)
except Exception as e:

    ele.send_keys(Keys.CONTROL, 'v')
    logger.info("办理材料名称输入成功", exc_info=True)
except Exception as e:

    logger.info("办理材料名称输入成功", exc_info=True)
